{{Infobox character
| name = Nakothi
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Dead Mother]], [[Great Elder]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|, [[Ruler|ruler]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Ruler|ruler]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Nakothi Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Nakothi, also known as the [[Dead Mother]], is a [[Great Elder]] whose primary pursuit is finding a perfect equilibrium between [[life]] and death. An immensely powerful and alien entity, she once ruled the Heartlands—the birthplace of humanity—and maintained a domain where she sought to merge living and dead states. Her presence is often characterized by an insatiable hunger, a putrid scent of decay, and a sensation that blends vibrant [[life]] with rotting death. Though her cults were largely eradicated by the Luminians centuries ago, her influence persists through various means. Nakothi's physical form is massive; her death throes were powerful enough to shatter continents and reshape landmasses. Even in a defeated state, her colossal body can cause geological destruction, such as breaking mountains or thrusting limbs into the sky. She possesses multiple hearts, which are potent objects of power that can be used to influence others or even sustain [[life]]. Her will is strong enough to exert control over individuals and can be felt through these hearts, which possess an icy, ancient signature. She creates monstrous entities known as the [[Children of Nakothi]] by embedding her power into human remains. These creatures, which include specialized workers and terrifying abominations made of mismatched flesh and organs, are often used to defile cities. She also utilizes servants such as the [[Handmaiden]] and various minions to carry out her intent. Nakothi's goal is not traditional rule, but rather an escape from her current state, often attempting to warp or remake human bodies into new vessels for her purpose.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Nakothi is a [[Great Elder]] and an [[island]] that shares bodies, also known by the title of [[Dead Mother]]. This entity is associated with hideous dead creatures and maintained an unfriendly relationship with the [[Lyathatan]]. While [[Calder]] remains on the [[island]] with its [[Heart]], Nakothi is a power that can be felt in the air and possesses both a [[Handmaiden]] and a [[Heart]]. [[Naberius]] eventually read the remnants of Nakothi's body, an entity that believes it improves humanity by warping their forms into the [[Children]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]] is said to share bodies.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c6">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]] is also referred to as the [[Dead Mother]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]] is an [[island]] where [[Calder]] is located with the [[Heart]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]] was not friendly with the [[Lyathatan]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]] is associated with hideous dead creatures.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]] has an [[island]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Naberius]] [[Read]] the remnants of [[Nakothi]]’s body.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]] is a power that can be felt in the air.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]] has a [[Heart]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]] has a [[Handmaiden]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]] is a [[Great Elder]] that [[Jerri]] wouldn't mind staying asleep forever.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Nakothi]] believes she improves humans by warping their bodies into the [[Children]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c28">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|As one of the final [[Great Elders]] to rule before the unification of humanity, Nakothi once governed the domain of birth and death and shaped the [[Children]] for specific roles. This entity, possessing twelve hearts and a song similar to the [[Heart]]'s, is capable of harming [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] and has even whispered promises of power to [[Shera]]. Nakothi's violent death-throes once leveled a continent to create the [[Aion Sea]], and while some believe the entity is merely dead or asleep, rumors persist that a vast, not-quite-dead body waits at the bottom of those waters alongside [[Kelarac]]. Though Nakothi's influence can be felt like a stench in certain cells and serves as a vulnerability for [[Readers]], the entity's power remains everywhere. Recently, Nakothi's voice howled through a chamber while shouting of rebirth, even as the [[Watchman]] and his crew plotted to harvest a heart from the corpse to achieve eternal [[life]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] once ruled a portion of the world and shaped the [[Children]] for specialized purposes.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] laughs in [[Shera]]'s head.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] is capable of harming [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Heart]]'s song is similar to [[Nakothi]]’s song.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] whispered: 'My power can become yours.'<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]]'s death-throes leveled a continent and created the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] was one of the last [[Great Elders]] to rule before humanity was united.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] ruled the domain of birth and death.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Some say [[Nakothi]]'s touch causes stillbirths.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] is rumored to wait at the bottom of the [[Aion]] alongside [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] has twelve hearts.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] may rise tonight.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]]'s influence can be felt in certain cells like a stench.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] is either dead or asleep.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] has a vast, not-quite-dead body.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The voice of [[Nakothi]] howled through the chamber.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] is a source of vulnerability for [[Readers]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]] shouted 'REBIRTH!'<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The power of [[Nakothi]] is everywhere.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c25">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Watchman]] and his crew intended to harvest a heart from [[Nakothi]]’s corpse to attain eternal [[life]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Driven by a desire for the malicious destruction of humankind, Nakothi is characterized as a mad individual. This entity possesses a unique power that many people fight to inherit. Nakothi's existence is also noted in relation to the timing of [[Duster]]. Ultimately, the entity pursues a perfect balance between [[life]] and death.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nakothi]] desires the malicious destruction of humankind.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nakothi]] possesses a power that people fight to inherit.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nakothi]] is described as mad.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nakothi]] is mentioned in relation to [[Duster]]'s timing.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Nakothi]] pursues the perfect balance of [[life]] and death.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|As a target of [[the Liberator]]'s war, Nakothi's death resulted in devastation that consumed an entire continent. This ruler's authority has governed humanity since birth, manifesting as a signature of insatiable hunger and the putrid stench of death. Nakothi's presence is a twisted blend of vibrant [[life]] and rotting death, characterized by an association with rebirth and a tendency to toy with death through dead monstrosities. [[Shera]] has faced the hordes of [[Nakothi's living corpses]] and currently carries one of the entity's weapons. Ultimately, Nakothi represents a type of [[Intent]] that [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s own [[Intent]] did not resemble, and it is a force capable of overcoming him.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi]] was a target of [[the Liberator]]'s war.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi]]'s death caused devastation that swallowed an entire continent.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] has faced the hordes of [[Nakothi's living corpses]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c3">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi]] is an entity or person [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] mentions losing himself to.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi]] is a type of [[Intent]] that [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s [[Intent]] did not feel like.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi]] is mentioned in comparison to the [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi]] is a ruler whose authority the human has lived under since birth.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi]]'s signature is an insatiable hunger paired with the putrid stench of death.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi]]'s presence is a twisted blend of vibrant [[life]] and rotting death.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi's Children]] are creatures that would attack out of pure malice.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Shera]] carries a weapon of [[Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi]]'s power is associated with rebirth.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi]] toys with death.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Nakothi]] has dead monstrosities.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[The Emperor]] can be overcome by [[Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|An unknown entity alongside [[Kthanikahr]], [[Tharlos]], and [[Othaghor]], Nakothi is a figure capable of corrupting [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]], who previously used one of its hearts to sustain his own [[life]]. Although its power is now a fading shadow of what it once was, the entity blurs the lines between [[life]] and death. While [[Bliss]] maintains a desire for nothing that Nakothi seeks, the entity was observed wading toward [[Calder]] and [[Shera]]. Its name has even been used by [[Foster]] in an exclamation.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Emperor]] used one of [[Nakothi]]’s hearts to stay alive.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Bliss]] does not want anything that [[Nakothi]] wants.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nakothi]] is an unknown entity alongside [[Kthanikahr]], [[Tharlos]], and [[Othaghor]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Foster]] used [[Nakothi]] in an exclamation.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nakothi]] was wading toward [[Calder]] and [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nakothi]] is a figure capable of corrupting [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nakothi]] blurs the lines between [[life]] and death.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Nakothi]]'s power is a fading shadow of its former self.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Known as the [[Dead Mother]], Nakothi is an unknown entity whose death throes cause widespread destruction to the land. While the [[Am’haranai]] once fulfilled contracts for her, she eventually exerted a secret influence over [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] before ultimately seizing control of his mind. Although [[Jorin]] theorized that [[Shera]] might be one of the few individuals capable of threatening her, Nakothi remained a being whose song could be heard within the mind and who possessed the ability to take a host to battle the [[Outsider]]. Ultimately, [[Shera]] tore Nakothi's power from stirring bodies, leading to her defeat.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nakothi]] is known as the [[Dead Mother]] and her death throes are destroying the land.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Am’haranai]] once took contracts from [[Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[The Emperor]] may have been secretly moved by [[Nakothi]]’s influence.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nakothi]] took over [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s mind.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Jorin]] theorized [[Shera]] might be the only one besides [[Regents]] who could threaten [[Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nakothi]] is an unknown entity.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] tore [[Nakothi]]’s power from the stirring bodies.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nakothi]] is a being that can take a host and rise to battle the [[Outsider]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nakothi]] is a being whose song can be heard in the mind.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nakothi]] was defeated.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“Nakothi take your corpse,” Foster said.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“But I’m doing everything I can to make sure that if Nakothi herself rises tonight, you’ll be able to handle it.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|"Why are you carrying a weapon of Nakothi, Consultant?"<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
